MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Philip T. Kilduff, 673-0368, specially appearing for petitioner and moving party

Petitioner's request for a continuance was denied. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER CACV OF COLORADO, LLC'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is denied for failure to provide a proof of service. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189
